text:
おつかれさん。
それなりに成果はあったようだね。

巣ごと退治といきたいところだけど
ヤツらの巣は人間の想い……
悩ましいね。

まあ、アタシらは目の前のエネミーを
淡々とつぶしていくだけ。

Welcome back.
It seems you've made quite the difference.

I'd love for you to cut them off at their
source, but given their "source" is human
thoughts, that could prove problematic. Vexing.

We'll have to settle for crushing every last
enemy that enters our sights. Keep it up.
